items.title: What's a Fair Price to Pay for Lockheed Martin Stock?
items.author: Parkev Tatevosian, Cfa
items.description: The article discusses a high-yield dividend stock that could generate $500 in passive income over the next 5 years with a $3,500 investment. It also mentions China's development of a 6th-generation fighter jet and its potential impact on major aerospace companies.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The article mentions Lockheed Martin as one of the aerospace companies that may be impacted by China's 6th-generation fighter jet development, but does not provide a clear positive or negative sentiment.
The article mentions Boeing as one of the aerospace companies that may be impacted by China's 6th-generation fighter jet development, but does not provide a clear positive or negative sentiment.
